original_snippet_context: Discussing the Convênio de Taubaté and its relation to the valorization of coffee.
relevant_quote: convencida de que as medidas concretizadas no convenio de Taubaté constituem, no momento economico que atravessamos, a suprema aspiração da lavoura cafeeira, segura de que a execução dessas medidas resolve o pro- blema da valorização do café
justification: This statement clearly aligns with the expansionist perspective as it supports the Convênio de Taubaté, which included provisions for a Caixa de Conversão designed to support coffee valorization and address the economic needs of the agricultural sector.
